gist.headline: Unity in translation
gist.blurb: The community just wired up Pollinations to translate Unity games on the fly. Free, uncensored text generation right in your favorite games.
gist.summary: Added XUnity.AutoPollinationTranslator to the community showcase, enabling free real-time translations for Unity games via the Pollinations API.
gist.impact: Gamers and modders can now seamlessly translate Unity games on the fly using our text generation endpoints.
gist.visual_concept: The PR is about translating Unity games. Visuals should include gaming elements (retro TV, controller) and translation metaphors (speech bubbles with different symbols). Polly the bee should be playing a game or acting as the translator.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of the cute bee mascot wearing a tiny gamer headset, sitting on a comfy cushion in front of a retro TV screen showing a pixelated video game. Glowing speech bubbles with different language characters float from the TV. Cozy 8-bit pixel art aesthetic. Soft lime green (#ecf874) and lavender pastel gradient background. Chunky retro sprites, warm lighting, lo-fi vibes like Stardew Valley. Nostalgic but beautiful, emotionally warm.
